root-question.text: Is this primarily an ML failure (not pure infra)?

question.text: Which root-cause class fits best from the enum?
Can an eval-guard be added that would have caught this case?

branch.conclusion: Author full postmortem; ship with named eval-guard and updated golden set version.
Author postmortem; document why no guard is possible (e.g. requires real-time labels not available).
Escalate to ML lead — root cause not yet identified.
Use DevOps postmortem template instead; this template's ML axes don't apply.

example.p: ml_failure=true → root_cause_class=hallucination → eval_guard_addable=true → conclusion: ship-postmortem with guard added (test for hallucination class in golden set).
